intentSynonyms: delete an ip access entry in mongodb
remove an ip access entry in mongodb
trash an ip access entry in mongodb
permanently delete an ip access entry in mongodb
delete ip access entry in mongodb
remove an ip from the access list in mongodb
description: Remove an IP address or CIDR block from the access list for the current MongoDB Atlas project.

ip_address.description: IP address or CIDR block to remove (e.g., "192.168.1.0/24")
